user.title: Connect Audiobookshelf
user.description: Enter an Audiobookshelf URL and API token. The token needs access to the library items and e-reader devices you want to use.

device.title: Choose default e-reader device
device.description: Audiobookshelf can send ebooks using its own e-reader and email settings. Configure SMTP and e-reader devices in Audiobookshelf, not Home Assistant.

abort.already_configured: This Audiobookshelf account is already configured.

init.title: Audiobookshelf options
init.description: Automatic sending can use Audiobookshelf's own send-to-device feature and configured e-reader devices.

send_ebook_to_device.name: Send ebook to device
send_ebook_to_device.description: Ask Audiobookshelf to send a library item's ebook to one of its configured e-reader devices.

device_name.name: Device name
device_name.description: Audiobookshelf e-reader device name. If omitted, the integration's default device is used.

force.name: Force
force.description: Send even if the item was already marked as sent to this device.

send_item.name: Send item
send_item.description: Compatibility alias for Send ebook to device.

device_name.name: Device name
device_name.description: Audiobookshelf e-reader device name. If omitted, the integration's default device is used.

force.name: Force
force.description: Send even if the item was already marked as sent to this device.

reset_sent_item.name: Reset sent item
reset_sent_item.description: Remove the sent marker for an Audiobookshelf item and e-reader device.

device_name.name: Device name
device_name.description: Audiobookshelf e-reader device name. If omitted, the legacy item-only marker is reset.

auth_failed.title: Audiobookshelf authentication failed
auth_failed.description: Audiobookshelf rejected the configured API token: {detail}. Reconfigure the integration with a valid token.

connectivity_failed.title: Audiobookshelf is not reachable
connectivity_failed.description: Home Assistant could not connect to Audiobookshelf: {detail}.

send_failed.title: Audiobookshelf send failed
send_failed.description: Audiobookshelf could not send the ebook to the configured e-reader device: {detail}.

missing_ebook.title: Audiobookshelf item has no ebook
missing_ebook.description: The triggered Audiobookshelf item does not contain an ebook file: {detail}.

missing_device.title: No e-reader device is configured
missing_device.description: Choose a default e-reader device in the Audiobookshelf integration options or pass device_name to the service call: {detail}.
